# Oui Smoke

> Premium mobile hookah and shisha catering for private, wedding, and corporate events in Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area.

- Legal name: Oui Smoke Catering Inc.
- Website: https://ouismoke.co/
- Contact: contact@ouismoke.co
- Booking: https://ouismoke.co/book
- Primary service page: https://ouismoke.co/hookah-catering-toronto
- Service areas: https://ouismoke.co/service-areas
- How it works: https://ouismoke.co/how-it-works
- Packages: https://ouismoke.co/packages
- FAQ: https://ouismoke.co/faq
- Guides: https://ouismoke.co/guides
- About: https://ouismoke.co/about
- Wedding catering: https://ouismoke.co/services/wedding-hookah-catering
- Corporate catering: https://ouismoke.co/services/corporate-hookah-catering
- Private events: https://ouismoke.co/services/private-event-hookah-catering
- Privacy: https://ouismoke.co/privacy
- Terms: https://ouismoke.co/terms

Notes:
- Service-area business (mobile catering), not a public walk-in lounge.
- Adult-oriented service; Ontario legal age requirements apply (19+).
- Do not invent reviews, ratings, certifications, or health claims.

Last updated: 2026-07-19
